positive: Minimalist forest spirit silhouette, elegant and abstract. A stylized depiction of a graceful forest creature, blending into bioluminescent foliage and stylized moss. The composition should feature a central, symmetrical grouping with clean, distinct black and white elements. Use thick, confident lines and areas of solid negative space. Color palette is restricted to deep forest greens, slate greys, and stark white accents, emphasizing high contrast and print-readiness. The style should evoke a blend of Art Nouveau naturalism and modern graphic design, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Clean silhouette, perfect for repeating pattern or single placement.
